category_sources: Official repository README calls FoBiS a Fortran Building System and automatic dependency-resolving build tool for modern Fortran projects.
source_facts.description says FoBiS is a KISS build tool for automatically building modern Fortran projects.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading is “FoBiS — Fortran Building System”; docs title is FoBiS.py.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links the full documentation at https://szaghi.github.io/FoBiS/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository https://github.com/szaghi/FoBiS.
tags_sources: Official repository topics include cli, fortran, build-tool, and automatic-dependency-generator; repository language is primarily Python.
source_facts.description identifies modern Fortran build automation.
